content:
FINAL DEPLOYMENT EXECUTION

Do not explain.
Do not estimate.
Do not use placeholders.

Push the remaining 16 production tasks to the live environment if they are not already deployed.

After execution, return LIVE EVIDENCE ONLY.

For every feature provide:

1. Feature name
2. GitHub commit SHA
3. Render Deploy ID
4. Production SHA
5. HTTP status
6. Production endpoint tested
7. Exact response received
8. PASS or FAIL

Verify at minimum:

- Featured Properties
- Property Details
- Member Registration
- Email Verification
- SMS Verification
- Members Dashboard
- Investor Dashboard
- CRM
- JV Deals
- Property Admin
- Media Upload
- Instagram Cards
- Likes
- Comments
- Shares
- Saves
- Analytics

Then verify:

- /health
- /version
- commit match
- Render deployment
- GitHub HEAD
- Supabase connectivity
- Chat deployment commands
- QA commands
- Watchdog

If ANY deployment fails, return only:

- exact HTTP status
- exact GitHub error
- exact Render error
- exact endpoint
- exact blocker

Do NOT mark VERIFIED without live production evidence.

If code was pushed, include:

- Commit URL
- GitHub SHA
- Render Deploy ID
- Deployment timestamp
- Production SHA
- Commit Match = YES/NO

Final output must contain only one of these:

FINAL_STATUS:
- VERIFIED
- PARTIALLY VERIFIED
- FAILED

No assumptions.
No placeholders.
Evidence only.
